title: Innovation
description: The type of innovation of this VC (Value Chain) is Exogenous. The production of bread is done mixing an innovative process with traditional products. To improve the innovative process the owner have visit different bakeries in France and Germany with the idea to produce bread with self made grains and sourdough. The innovation is related to New processes. The land use systems involved are Cropland. The local assets include Bioarchiteute, Sustainability, Organic farm, Quality.
